message:
fix: make nodes clickable and visible in drill-down views (#8654)

- ClusterDrillDown: add onClick handler to node items in resource tree
  so clicking a node name navigates to the NodeDrillDown detail view
- ClusterDrillDown: make the Nodes stat block clickable — switches to
  the Resources tab with Nodes lens and scrolls to the nodes section
- MultiClusterSummaryDrillDown: add demoWhenEmpty fallback to
  useCachedNodes so the all-nodes drill-down shows demo data when live
  node data is unavailable, instead of an empty list
- MultiClusterSummaryDrillDown: show Demo badge when nodes are using
  demo fallback data

Fixes #8644, Fixes #8645, Fixes #8650

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
